title: The Main MHRA Inspection Types
alt: Five MHRA inspection types and what each one tests

items.label: Pre-approval (initial)
items.desc: New MIA or WDA: proves systems are designed and ready

items.label: Routine (periodic)
items.desc: Risk-based cycle: tests consistent operation since last visit

items.label: For-cause (triggered)
items.desc: Sparked by recall, defect or allegation; deep on that issue

items.label: Follow-up
items.desc: Returns to verify prior findings are remediated and holding

items.label: Product-specific / targeted
items.desc: Scoped to one product, process, line or import route
